data.title: The Fresh Market opens second store in Aventura, Fla., donates $2,000 to Feeding South Florida, and welcomes chef Carla Hall.
data.description: A new branch of The Fresh Market has opened in Aventura, Florida, marking its second store in the region. The grocery retailer inaugurated its Aventura Square store by ceremoniously cutting a six-foot loaf of Cuban bread. The opening event included giveaways, sampling, and a $2,000 contribution to Feeding South Florida food bank. Celebrity chef Carla Hall also graced the occasion with her presence.

data.title: Laura Meyers promoted to Director of The Pines at Shrub Oak, serving neurodiverse youth. #ShrubOak #LauraMeyers
data.description: Mohegan Lake, New York - On February 18, 2026, Shrub Oak International School has promoted Laura Meyers, LCAT, ATR-BC, as the Director of The Pines at Shrub Oak. This program caters to neurodiverse individuals from children to young adults. The appointment is set to enhance the specialized therapeutic residential services offered by the program.

data.title: Stavtar Solutions appoints Michael Basen as Head of StavMarket for business spend management and expense allocation SaaS.
data.description: On February 18, 2026, in New York, Stavtar Solutions, a renowned supplier of business spend management and expense allocation SaaS solutions for intricate enterprises like alternative asset managers, revealed the selection of Michael Basen as the Head of StavMarket. StavMarket is a significant division within the company.

data.title: Eramet faces challenges in 2025, with key numbers indicating a decline across Adjusted EBITDA, net income, and cash flow. The company plans structural measures to strengthen the balance sheet, with a focus on enhancing cash generation and strategic asset reviews for monetisation options in 2026. The company's financial performance, strategic initiatives, safety commitment, and operational milestones are detailed in the report.
data.description: Eramet, a mining and metallurgical group, has announced structural measures to strengthen its balance sheet after facing challenges in 2025. The company reported Adjusted EBITDA of €372 million, down 54% from 2024, largely due to an unfavorable price and exchange rate impact, impacting manganese operations adversely. The group reported a net income of -€477 million, including an asset impairment charge for the mineral sands activity. Eramet is focusing on improving cash generation, with plans to strengthen the balance sheet by implementing a funding plan. The company aims to improve performance through its ReSolution program and plans to monetize assets in 2026. Eramet also plans to strengthen its equity base by around €500 million in 2026. Eramet reported key figures for its different activities, including manganese, nickel, mineral sands, and lithium. In 2026, the company aims to increase transported manganese ore between 6.4 and 6.8 Mt and sell 9 Mwmt of nickel ore externally. Additionally, Eramet aims to produce between 17 and 20 kt-LCE of lithium carbonate in 2026. The company also plans to control capex between €250m and €290m in 2026, a reduction from the previous year. The financial and operational challenges faced by Eramet have led to a strategic review and structural actions to improve performance and strengthen the balance sheet. The company is committed to enhancing its cash generation and navigating a more favorable commodity pricing environment in 2026.

data.title: Correction by WK Kellogg Co.: Kellogg's Frosted Flakes and J.I.D collaborate to inspire teens to embrace their greatness.
data.description: Kellogg's Frosted Flakes® has partnered with J.I.D to inspire teenagers to embrace their greatness in a collaboration announced on Feb. 18, 2026. The initiative aims to motivate youths to unleash their potential. The announcement came from WK Kellogg Co. via PR Newswire, with updates to the original news release. The joint effort is focused on encouraging teens to be their best selves.

data.title: AxisCare named #1 in G2's 2026 Best Healthcare Software list. Provider of home care management software.
data.description: Today, in Waco, Texas, AxisCare has proudly declared as the top-ranked home care management software in G2's Home Care Agency Management Category. This recognition comes in the year 2026, solidifying AxisCare's position as a leading provider in the industry. This acknowledgment is a significant achievement and showcases the company's dedication to providing top-notch software solutions for home care agencies.

data.title: Inventor creates new back washer/scratcher device (MBQ-846) to aid self-sufficiency. Injury inspired the innovation.
data.description: A Pittsburgh resident provided information on Feb. 18, 2026, about an inventor from Tuscaloosa, Ala., who developed a solution to assist with daily activities. The inventor, who suffered injuries in a work accident, experienced reduced self-sufficiency and limited mobility. They required help with tasks like cleaning, exfoliating, and scratching their back during showers. The invention aimed to address these challenges and improve the individual's quality of life.

data.title: CIM Group finishes 75-unit apartment building in West Adams, LA.
data.description: CIM Group has finished construction on The Read, a contemporary apartment complex comprising 75 units located in the West Adams area of Los Angeles.

data.title: KBRA assigns ratings to $602.7M ADMT 2026-NQM2 with 1,793 residential mortgages, majority originated by A&D Mortgage LLC.
data.description: In New York, KBRA has assigned preliminary ratings to 10 classes of mortgage pass-through certificates from ADMT 2026-NQM2, a non-prime RMBS transaction totaling $602.7 million. This deal is sponsored by Atlas A&D Opportunity Fund III LP, with a large portion of the loans originating from A&D Mortgage, LLC or its corresponding entities. The pool consists of 1,793 residential mortgages, with a notable concentration of loans underwritten through alternative methods.

data.title: Potomac Edison completes new substation in Berkeley County, benefits 2,400 customers, improves service reliability.
data.description: A company called Potomac Edison, which is a subsidiary of FirstEnergy Corp., recently finished constructing a new substation in Berkeley County, West Virginia. The completion of this facility is aimed at enhancing the reliability of electric service in the area. This move is expected to benefit approximately 2,400 customers by reducing outages and supporting the region's growth.

data.title: Colorado Dept. of Education approved Collaborative Classroom's SIPPS Fifth Edition program on READ Act Advisory List.
data.description: In Denver on February 18, 2026, it was reported that Collaborative Classroom's SIPPS®, Fifth Edition curriculum has been approved by the Colorado Department of Education. This curriculum has been included on Colorado's READ Act Advisory List of Instructional Programming. SIPPS, which stands for Systematic Instruction in Phonological Awareness, Phonics, and Sight Words, aims to enhance literacy skills in students. This approval signifies a significant milestone for Collaborative Classroom as it reflects the recognition of the curriculum's effectiveness by education authorities.

data.title: Goldman Sachs CEO and NYSE President boosted World Liberty Crypto event; WLFI surges 17%; Solomon owns 'some' Bitcoin; sees coexistence of traditional banking with crypto. Wall Street supporting tokenization. Market evolution driven by tech platforms; tokenization crucial - Solomon. Visit Benzinga.com for full story.
data.description: The cryptocurrency World Liberty Financial (WLFI) experienced a significant 17% surge following a speech by Goldman Sachs CEO David Solomon and NYSE President Lynn Martin at the first World Liberty Forum held at Mar-a-Lago. This event marked a notable shift in Wall Street's attitude towards tokenization. Solomon disclosed that he holds a small amount of Bitcoin (BTC) and considers himself an observer seeking to comprehend its movements. He emphasized the coexistence of traditional banks and cryptocurrencies, insisting that they are not engaged in a zero-sum battle. Solomon stressed the importance of tokenization in shaping the future of markets, driven by large technology platforms. This development reflects a growing acceptance and integration of digital assets in the financial sector.

data.title: NVIDIA cuda.compute library led GPU MODE benchmarks with 2-4x speedups, boosting Python developers' CUDA C++ performance.
data.description: The latest cuda.compute library from NVIDIA has outperformed GPU MODE benchmarks, showcasing remarkable CUDA C++ speed through Python alone with speed increases of 2-4 times compared to custom kernels. This innovation has the potential to revolutionize GPU performance, promising improved speeds and efficiency.

data.title: EncorVita™ Health acquires menopause & sexual health platform from Eterna, Inc. to expand provider training in medical clinics.
data.description: A women's health company based in Newport Beach, California known as EncorVita™ Health revealed on February 18, 2026 that it has completed the acquisition of provider-oriented menopause and sexual health education and clinical assets from Eterna, Inc. This acquisition is part of EncorVita™ Health's efforts to enhance care options for women going through perimenopause and menopause. The company is dedicated to addressing the specific needs of women during this transitional phase.

data.title: Grainger to vote on 12 directors at annual meeting on April 29, 2026.
data.description: Chicago-based company Grainger (NYSE: GWW) revealed today that its Board of Directors has put forth a group of 12 nominees, all of whom are current Board members, for the upcoming term spanning 2026-2027. Shareholders will cast their votes on the selected nominees during the 2026 Annual Meeting.
